title: SAP SuccessFactors - Cloud Specialist
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

EPI-USE is part of the groupelephant.com group of companies. Employing over 2,000 people, groupelephant.com includes EPI-USE, which is the world’s largest and most experienced independent SAP HCM specialist and which has emerged as a leader in designing, building and implementing Cloud-based, hybrid and on-premises HR/Payroll systems for large, complex multinational corporations. With a suite covering 41 countries, EPI-USE is the world’s largest independent purveyor of SAP country versions for regions in which SAP does not offer a standard payroll solution.

Job Summary

Lead the implementation and configuration of SAP Cloud HR solutions across multiple SuccessFactors modules, delivering high-quality project outcomes and driving customer success through expert guidance, problem-solving, and stakeholder collaboration.

Responsibilities

  • Configure and implement SAP SuccessFactors modules including Employee Central, Performance and Goals, Succession and Career Development, Recruiting, Onboarding, Learning, and Compensation to meet customer business needs
  • Develop and deliver project artifacts such as workbooks, configuration settings, test results, solution recommendations, and data migration strategies to ensure successful project execution
  • Provide timely and clear status updates to project managers to support project tracking and decision-making
  • Diagnose and resolve technical issues and challenges by applying best practices and standards to maintain solution integrity
  • Manage customer relationships throughout the implementation lifecycle to ensure alignment and satisfaction
  • Document detailed customer business requirements and translate them into effective SuccessFactors configurations
  • Take full ownership of the quality and accuracy of all work performed to uphold project standards
  • Communicate effectively with colleagues, clients, and customers at all organizational levels through formal and informal channels
  • Educate customers on SuccessFactors functional and technical requirements by conducting discovery meetings and training sessions
  • Analyze, interpret, and map business processes to align SAP solutions with organizational workflows
  • Maintain expert knowledge of the SuccessFactors product suite, including staying current with delta certifications, to provide authoritative guidance
  • Coach and develop junior consultants to enhance team capability and SAP SuccessFactors expertise
  • Deliver train-the-trainer, administrative, and reporting training to empower customer teams in system use and management

Required competencies and certifications

  • Certified in SAP Cloud Solution in one or more SuccessFactors modules, with Associate Certification as a minimum requirement
  • Demonstrated knowledge and application of the SAP Activate methodology for SuccessFactors implementations

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Proven experience implementing HRIS software within or for Human Resource departments
  • Familiarity with Human Resources business domain and HR practices
  • Experience managing Quality Assurance processes for software implementations
  • Strong leadership, communication (written and oral), and interpersonal skills demonstrated in team-oriented environments
  • Ability to work creatively and analytically to solve complex problems
  • Minimum of 5 years relevant work experience, preferably with leading system integrators

EPI-USE is part of the groupelephant.com group of companies. Employing over 2,000 people, groupelephant.com includes EPI-USE, which is the world’s largest and most experienced independent SAP HCM specialist and which has emerged as a leader in designing, building and implementing Cloud-based, hybrid and on-premises HR/Payroll systems for large, complex multinational corporations. With a suite covering 41 countries, EPI-USE is the world’s largest independent purveyor of SAP country versions for regions in which SAP does not o?er a standard payroll solution. In its 30- plus year history, EPI-USE has implemented or been involved with more than 1,000 SAP/SuccessFactors HCM-based solutions around the world.

Through a proprietary range of add-on software products, EPI-USE’s clients have access toworld-class productivity tools to enhance their existing or planned implementations of SAP HCM. EPI-USE Labs, the Group’s software arm, also o?ers non-HR related SAP data management and landscape transformation software andservices.
